MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-30-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant City And County Of San Francisco To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Frederick P. Sheinfield
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant City And County Of San Francisco To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Monetary Sanctions is off calendar per request of moving party. =(302/JPT/HK)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Greg O'Connell, Esq. of Dolan Law Firm, T:415.421.2800, counsel for plaintiff, and moving party;
Frederick P. Sheinfield, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, T:415.554.3872, for defendant CCSF.

RULING: There being no appearance by plaintiff, or objection by any party, PLAINTIFF ADAM WISHON's MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL for Plaintiff Adam Wishon is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

ORDER SIGNED in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.
